matches.x: 2 And he came up, und. told his father and his mother, and said, I have seen. a woman in Timnath of the daughters of the Philistines; now therefore get her for me to wife.

like acting over again that most interesting part of Sacred Scripture. The Nestorian patriarch Abraham, . . . who was in place of a father to his younger brother, Isaac, being desirous of procuring a wife for his foster son, sent his most trusty steward to a distant part of the country to obtain one from his own people. The servant took with him jewels and rai- ment for the future wife of Isaac,…
2 And he came up, und. told his father and his mother, and said, I have seen. a woman in Timnath of the daughters of the Philistines; now therefore get her for me to wife.
